query: SELECT ce.id, ce.userId, ce.courseId, c.id, c.title FROM courseEnrollments ce JOIN courses c ON ce.courseId = c.id WHERE ce.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'teststudent@crosslife.test') ORDER BY c.title;
